nodes.label: runIngest
nodes.description: Main async generator orchestrating the full ingest pipeline: reads source file, detects domain, loads existing wiki pages (optionally with similarity-based BFS selection), calls LLM via parseWithRetry, validates/fixes paths and WikiLinks, writes output pages, updates source frontmatter with backlinks, refreshes similarity cache, and emits RunEvents throughout.

nodes.label: detectDomain
nodes.description: Matches an absolute file path against configured domain source_paths to find the owning DomainEntry; falls back to the first domain if no match.

nodes.label: buildIngestMessages
nodes.description: Assembles the OpenAI chat message array for the ingest LLM call: renders system prompt from ingest template and builds user message containing source content, existing wiki pages, and index.

nodes.label: buildEntityTypesBlock
nodes.description: Renders the entity types section of the ingest prompt from a DomainEntry's entity_types array, including path templates per entity type.

nodes.label: retryInvalidPaths
nodes.description: Sends a follow-up LLM message asking the model to correct pages whose paths violate the 4-segment wiki path rule; returns raw text response.

nodes.label: splitByPathValidity
nodes.description: Partitions an array of LLM-produced pages into valid and invalid subsets based on validateArticlePath, exempting system files (prefixed _ and ending .md).

nodes.label: parseJsonPages
nodes.description: Extracts a JSON array of page objects from raw LLM text, used to parse the retry response for invalid paths.

nodes.label: extractParentSourcePath
nodes.description: Returns the vault-relative parent directory of the ingested source file, clamped to vault root, used for source_path_added event.

nodes.label: buildIngestSummary
nodes.description: Formats a Russian-language summary string of the ingest result (pages created/updated/errored) for display.

nodes.label: parseWikiStatus
nodes.description: Extracts the wiki_status frontmatter value from page content for log entries.

edges.relation: calls to validate and parse LLM output against WikiPagesOutputSchema with retries
calls via retryInvalidPaths to build LLM params for path correction retry
calls via retryInvalidPaths to extract text from stream chunks
calls to identify domain for the source file
calls to construct the LLM prompt messages
calls to partition pages before write loop
calls when invalid paths are detected after initial parse
calls to build result text after write loop
calls to programmatically fix/validate WikiLinks in all output pages before writing
calls to expand similarity seed page ids to a broader set via BFS on the wiki graph
uses graphCache.get to build/retrieve cached wiki link graph for BFS expansion
optionally uses PageSimilarityService to select relevant existing pages before LLM call
calls after each page write to store page annotation in domain index
calls to parse existing index annotations for similarity selection
calls after writing pages to append structured log entry for the ingest operation
calls to update source file frontmatter with wiki_added, wiki_updated, wiki_articles backlinks
calls to read existing wiki_articles links from source frontmatter before merging
calls to check if wiki_added is already set before writing backlink date
calls to ensure domain config files exist before processing
calls via splitByPathValidity to enforce 4-level path rule
calls to merge LLM-produced entity_types_delta into domain config after successful ingest
yields RunEvent values throughout to stream progress and results to caller
passes as schema to parseWithRetry for output validation
calls to embed entity types section in system prompt
calls to render ingest.md prompt template with domain/wiki variables
caller (runIngest) uses parseJsonPages to parse the text returned by retryInvalidPaths
uses VaultTools for all file I/O: read, write, listFiles, readAll, toVaultPath
calls to resolve domain wiki folder path
calls to resolve domain _index.md path
reads global wiki schema from this path for prompt context
calls to convert page paths to ids for BFS seed and expansion filtering
